reason: Added user-based owner-name resolution in the route list path and preserved snapshot fallback logic.
notes: Introduced a users collection reference, owner-name lookup helper, and display-name override conversion.

reason: Added coverage for the owner-name override/fallback behavior used by route listing.
notes: Pure unit test for the public conversion helper.

reason: Documented that route list responses resolve current owner names from the users collection.
notes: Clarifies denormalized snapshot behavior for future maintainers.

reason: Added lastActiveAt persistence, compatibility fallback serialization, and the TouchLastActive storage method used by authenticated access.
notes: Also kept lastLoginAt as a deprecated alias in the public JSON contract.

reason: Refreshed the active timestamp on successful login, password-based session renewal, and every authenticated request that passes requireUser.
notes: The handler now writes back the current active time into the in-memory user before returning auth responses.

reason: Renamed the managed user timestamp contract to lastActiveAt so the admin UI matches the new backend field.
notes: The frontend type no longer depends on lastLoginAt.

reason: Updated the admin users table and mobile cards to label and render Last active using the new timestamp field.
notes: Kept the existing visual layout and added a neutral empty-state message for users with no activity yet.

reason: Added admin-only owner filtering, persisted selection wiring, and empty-state clearing behavior in the routes table UI.
notes: Also now accepts current user identity props from the workspace.

reason: Passed current user identity to the route table so filter persistence can be scoped per signed-in user and account labels can be rendered.
notes: No backend changes were required.

reason: Centralized localStorage keying and read/write helpers for the persisted account filter preference.
notes: Keeps storage access out of the main table component.
